type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: McClean Lake Operation discharged treated minewater from both water treatment plants on-site: JEB Water treatment plant and Sue water treatment plant. The JEB water treatment plant operated all year, while the Sue water treatment plant operated from June to October.  The Sue water treatment plant releases the most nitrate and it produced approximately 104,208 more cubic meters of effluent in 2015 than 2014.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: This substance is released through the two water treatment plants at site: JEB and Sue water treatment plants. Approx 450,000 fewer cubic meters of treated effluent was deposited from the Sue water treatment plant than in 2012.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The vast bulk of the arsenic was deposited into the tailings impoundment facility as a treated sludge.  AREVA's McClean Lake Operation was in care and maintenance mode in 2013, so there was no actual tailings deposited, therefore the "Landfill" option was chosen above. There was an increase of approximately 800 tonnes of treated sludge from the JEB Water Treatment Plant, which contains arsenic.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The vast bulk of the arsenic was deposited into the tailings impoundment facility as a treated sludge.  AREVA's McClean Lake Operation was in care and maintenance mode in 2012, so there was no actual tailings deposited, therefore the "Landfill" option was chosen above. Approximately 100 fewer tonnes were produced in 2012 than in 2011; this coupled with lower arsenic concentrations in the material disposed accounted for the significantly lower amount of arsenic deposited.

Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Process adjustments made to reduce sulphur dioxide in stack emissions result in more ammonia reporting to the stack scrubbers. In some operating conditions, “ammonia slip” occurs and ammonia increases in the stack emissions.  In addition, a calculation error was discovered which resulted in under-reporting ammonia released to air in previous years. Both of these factors account for the increase in ammonia released to air.

comments.comment: Previously kerosene consumption was attributed as losses to tailings where it was thought to be converted to bicarbonate. Recent review of this accounting now suggests that Kerosene may be lost in the form of VOC. Until it can be determined definitively how it is released it will be reported as a VOC to be conservative.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: McClean Lake Operation discharged treated minewater from both water treatment plants on-site: JEB Water treatment plant and Sue water treatment plant. The JEB water treatment plant operated all year, while the Sue water treatment plant operated from June to October.  The decrease in deposited nitrate is a result of lower concentrations discharged from the JEB water treatment plant.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Previously kerosene consumption was attributed as losses to tailings where it was thought to be converted to bicarbonate. Recent review of this accounting now suggests that Kerosene may be lost in the form of VOC. Until it can be determined definitively how it is released it will be reported as a VOC to be conservative.

reasonsForPlan.fr: Plan préparé ou mis en œuvre pour une autre autorité gouvernementale (c.-à-d., autre ministère fédéral, province, municipalité)

p2Plan.planComment: The plan was prepared for the Canadian Nuclear Safety Commission.

reasonsForNoActivities.fr: Autres (précisez dans le champ des commentaires)

p2Plan.noActivitiesComment: No new pollution abatement activities occurred in 2022 that had a measurable reduction of any NPRI substances.  There have been small improvements to current processing/handling of materials but they did not result in measurable reduction of any NPRI substances.
